projectDescription: An AI-powered web platform that mitigates academic procrastination through adaptive micro-interactions, using a real-time EMA chatbot to assess cognitive fatigue and automatically decompose complex tasks into manageable micro-objectives.
keyFeatures: EMA chatbot that collects real-time cognitive fatigue scores (1–5 scale)
AI-powered task decomposer that splits complex tasks into micro-objectives (≤25 min each) when fatigue ≥ 4
Student dashboard with active tasks, pending micro-objectives, and 30-session fatigue history chart
JWT-based authentication with bcrypt password hashing and 24-hour token expiry
NestJS REST API under /api/v1/ with consistent JSON envelope responses
Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL, parameterized queries, and referential integrity constraints
Property-based testing (PBT) with fast-check covering 27 correctness properties
Containerized monorepo with Docker Compose for reproducible local development
Notification service with frequency limiting (≤3 per 24h) and active-session suppression
Session serializer with strict round-trip and type-preservation guarantees
